name: Settings Nav
description: Vertical navigation list for settings and preferences pages with grouped sections, active state highlighting, icons, and badges. Collapses to horizontal tabs on mobile.

standard.description: Vertical sidebar navigation with grouped sections and icon-prefixed items — used as a settings page sidebar alongside a content panel

compact.description: Condensed vertical list without group headings — suitable for narrow sidebars or drawers with limited items

tabs.description: Horizontal tab bar variant for top-of-page navigation — items render as underlined tabs rather than a sidebar list

visual_brief: A vertical navigation list on the left side of a settings page. Items are grouped under small uppercase section headings (d-label). Each item is a row with a 16-20px icon on the left, label text in the middle, and an optional badge or count on the right. Active item has a primary-color left border (3px), primary-tinted background, and primary text color. Hover state shows a subtle surface background tint. Items have 8-10px vertical padding and 12px horizontal padding. Groups are separated by 16px spacing and a muted horizontal divider. On mobile the entire nav collapses to a horizontal scrollable tab bar at the top, with icon-only items and the active tab underlined.

layout_hints.active_indicator: Active item uses a 3px left border in var(--d-primary) color plus a light primary background tint: background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--d-primary) 10%, transparent).
layout_hints.group_headings: Section group headings use the d-label class. They are not clickable, just visual separators.
layout_hints.icon_alignment: Icons are 16-20px, vertically centered with the label text. Use flex + align-items: center.
layout_hints.mobile_tabs: On mobile (<640px), render as a horizontal scrollable row of tab items. Show icon + short label. Active tab has a bottom border instead of left border.

slots.group-heading: Uppercase section label (d-label) separating navigation groups. Not interactive.
slots.nav-item: Repeating slot — one per settings page. Renders as a flex row with icon (left), label (center), and optional badge/count (right). Active state indicated by left border + background tint. Hover shows surface background.
slots.divider: Thin horizontal line (1px border-top, var(--d-border)) between groups.

accessibility.focus_management: Focus remains on the activated item after navigation. On mobile tab switch, focus moves to the content panel.

responsive.mobile: Collapses to a horizontal scrollable tab bar at the top of the page. Items show icon + abbreviated label. Active tab has a 2px bottom border in primary color. Group headings are hidden. Horizontal scroll with momentum enabled.
responsive.tablet: Standard vertical sidebar at 200-240px width. All items and group headings visible. Badge counts shown.
responsive.desktop: Full vertical sidebar at 240-280px width. All items, group headings, badges, and descriptions visible. Sticky positioning within scroll container.

composition.NavItem: Link(d-interactive, flex, align-center, gap-3, px-3, py-2) > [Icon(16px) + Label(text-sm) + Badge?(d-annotation, ml-auto)]

transitions.page_switch: Content panel cross-fades on nav item selection (0.15s ease)
